content: NO I'M NOT

fairy ghostmother?
so in other words, unemployed <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
very unemployed
only holding a position in name
like a useless ceo
i have my doubts that doresain does any work either
he might be a trust fund kid who makes fran do everything
would explain why he has time to take random tourists on personal tours
and cook 5 course meals
karen: domestic servant (employed by sorel)
murphy: FREELOADING despite being 25 years old
doresain is a noble and given the amount of respect he commands im inclined to believe that he does a respectable amount of administration work
theres 0 chance murphy has a job
most unemployed woman ive ever seen
Murphy's definitely a freeloader
candy ghost my ass
ig maybe he does diplomat work
hosting, foreign relations
local policy too
fran seems like the admin and policy guy
doresain just overrides him when he wants to push an agenda
hmm, i cant say much about fran since my personal interpretation of him was as doresains personal butler
necrovia does not seem to have a very large government
my impression is that its basically one castle town
which is being run like a feudal estate
so if fran is the "head butler" that implies he is seneschal of the whole thing
or is necrovia actually a dictatorship...?
since iirc we didnt see any other necrovian nobles
its a monarchy
like you said it seems like the only noble around is doresain
so it seems to be a small one-town fiefdom
so yes for all intents and purposes its a hereditary dictatorship i guess
absolute monarchy
doresain sure isnt consulting any parliament or war council
its just him lol
what even is the economy of necrovia
if u think about it all these ghouls seem to have a thriving internal economy with a market street
implying sufficient employment and population for a monetized market economy
but what do all of them DO
do they have any agriculture or industry
necrovia is literally invisible to outsiders so they sure as hell dont have a tourism industry

even if u assume a good chunk of them are full time soldiers or retainers (explaining why doresain can just throw infinite bodies at the seafarer invasion) u cant have an isolationist country that consists of nothing but soldiers
the merchants need somewhere to source their goods and human body parts from
somebody has to keep the lights on and the streets swept
where is the appreciation for the humble ghoul electricians and sewage workers
and where do they get the raw materials for any of these
is doresain ordering 200 tons of stone masonry off amazon
does the magic seal also magically house and feed 1000 people
the most likely explanation to me is that necrovia actually just sits on a giant crude oil deposit and doresain is an oil baron, or something like that
its in a dream so they do dream fuckery i guess
if its in a dream how is goliath invading <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
it clearly has a physical presence
and the ghouls literally do eat corpses
which are implied to be actual corpses not just dream stuff
theres definitely some metaphysical fuckery going on since necrovia seems to exist outside of reality
but also, it seems to abide by physical laws, and therefore must abide by economic laws unless proven otherwise
fix the economy doresain <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
this is the problem with unelected dictators......
i think the conclusion is that necrovia is actually a horrible place to live, like north korea, it is a playground for doresain and his cadre of loyalists and awful for the average ghoul
all the wealth is concentrated in the hands of a few
and doresain uses his private army to oppress the lower classes
an unsustainable farce, sustained only by the windfall from natural resource extraction, and possibly old money that multiplies through investment
and ghouls can't leave necrovia bc they will be ostracized by the rest of the world
does doresain regularly lure schmucks like pickman into his personal fiefdom to entrap them with promises of immortality
we thought doresain was a good guy but he might be even more evil than miryam <:cry3:1356082134447558748>
<@88644018673582080> do u have any defense of doresain
did i miss anything <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
fascinating
i agree with all of it
down with doresain
overthrow the monarchy
one ghoul one vote
Awakeners are dead people from different points of time right?
not necessarily
Explain
some awakeners are people who were transformed into awakeners while still alive, just that mythag typically doesn't do that for ethical reasons
thats why so many of the awakeners we control are revival types
but if its just awakeners awakened by mythag, then yes, they're dead people from various points in time, as long as they have silver
You can consider them dead if it helps though
if you want an example of a live awakener who was transformed on screen, theres the mouchette side story
Oh like Jenkins sister
Ty
